message:
test(conformance): diff futimes/lutimes/futimens vs glibc [bd-xn6p8]

Adds an 8-test harness for the futime family that conformance_diff_utime.rs
left unfilled:
  - futimes(fd, tv) — explicit times + invalid-fd error path
  - lutimes(path, tv) — symlink-aware, verified via lstat
  - futimens(fd, ts) — nanosecond precision, UTIME_NOW + UTIME_OMIT
    sentinels, NULL-times current-time path

All cases pass against host glibc 2.42 with zero divergences.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
